title: rhododendron jasminoides
intro: Rhododendron jasminoides, also known as the Fragrant Azalea or Trailing Azalea, is a flowering shrub native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron jasminoides include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Rhododendron jasminoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
